## Wind load

### Wind regional parameters

```{julia}
href = 12.5m + 8m / 2
wp_uls = AS1170WindParam(; Ruls=500yrs, Rsls=25yrs, Region=:C, href=href, cat=1.0, Ms=1, Mt=1, Vo=25m / s)
_println(wp_uls)
```

### Building Openings

#### Roof openings

```{julia}
A_open_roof = 23 * π / 4 * (1.2m)^2
```

#### East wall openings

![](images/opening_east.png)

```{julia}
A1 = 2 * (1.8m)^2 # 2 doors in shed 2
A2 = 46m^2 # for roller door
A3 = 2.6m * (56m + 5.5m) # area between top of retainging wall and cladding bottom edge
A_open_east = sum([A1, A2, A3])
```

#### West wall openings

![opening, tippler side](images/opening_west_tippler.png)
![Opening, gap between retaining wall, and cladding](images/opening_west_ret_walls.png)
![Opening, truck bay door](images/opening_truckbay.png)

```{julia}
A4 = (3 + 2)m^2 # 2 doors in tippler building
# opening between the gap  of the retaining wall and cladding bottom edge, grid 1-12, 24-27
A5 = 1.7m * (10 * 8m + 6m * 2 + 2 * 8m)
A6 = 140m^2 # truck bay door
A_open_west = sum([A4, A5, A6])
```

#### North wall openings

```{julia}
A7 = (7 + 2 + 2 + 8)m^2
A8 = 1.7m * 35m # area between top of retainging wall and cladding bottom edge, shed 1
A9 = 2.6m * (43.6m) # area between top of retainging wall and cladding bottom edge, shed 3
A_open_north = sum([A7, A8, A9])
```

#### South wall openings

![Opening A10](images/opening_south_shed1.png)

![Door, shed 2](images/opening_south_door_shed2.png)

```{julia}
# shed 1 door, see drg 595-4-5541
A10 = 44m^2

# area between top of retainging wall and cladding bottom edge, shed 1
A11 = 1.7m * (15.6m)

# shed 2 door, see drg 595-4-5548
A12 = 44m^2
A_open_south = sum([A10, A11, A12])
```

```{julia}
vA_opening = [A_open_roof, A_open_north, A_open_east, A_open_south, A_open_west]
```

### Wind +Y (east-west)

building dimension for purposes of wind load calculation

```{julia}
B = 43.6m + 31m + 15.6m |> f2
L = 204m;
B, L
```

#### Downward critical roof wind load

For shed 2 or shed 3 roof pressures, external

```{julia}
b = L |> f2
d = B |> f2
α = 20°
bldg_yy_shed23 = AS1170_2_BldgParams(wp_uls, b, d, href, α; Ao_roof=A_open_roof, Ao_north=A_open_north, Ao_east=A_open_east, Ao_south=A_open_south, Ao_west=A_open_west)
```

Uniform line load for the rafter, upwind face

```{julia}
#| echo: false 
res_rafter_shed23_upwind = fwind_rafter(bldg_yy_shed23,
    wind_dir=:E,
    isUplift=false,
    isUpwind=true,
    bw=8.0m,
    lw=23m,
    x_from_windward_edge=0m)
_println(res_rafter_shed23_upwind)
```


Uniform line load for the rafter, downwind face, shed 2/3

```{julia}
#| echo: false 
res_rafter_shed23_downwind = fwind_rafter(bldg_yy_shed23;
    wind_dir=:E,
    isUplift=false,
    isUpwind=false,
    bw=8.0m,
    lw=23m,
    x_from_windward_edge=43.0m)
_println(res_rafter_shed23_downwind)
```

For shed 1 rafter, uniform line load for the rafter, downwind face

```{julia} 
α = 3.0°
bldg_yy_shed1 = AS1170_2_BldgParams(wp_uls, b, d, href, α; Ao_roof=A_open_roof, Ao_north=A_open_north, Ao_east=A_open_east, Ao_south=A_open_south, Ao_west=A_open_west)

fcpe(t) = fCpe_roof(bldg_yy_shed1; x=t, isUplift=false, isUpwind=false)
t = 0m:1m:90.2m
plot(t, fcpe.(t))
```

```{julia}
#| echo: false 
res_rafter_shed1 = [fwind_rafter(bldg_yy_shed1;
    wind_dir=:E,
    isUplift=false,
    isUpwind=false,
    bw=8.0m,
    lw=46m,
    x_from_windward_edge=x) for x in href * [3, 4]]
# _println(res)
loads = [t.load for t in res_rafter_shed1]
DataFrame("Distance from windward edge" => [3, 4] .* href, "Load" => loads)
```

```{julia}
res = get_bldg_wind_load(bldg_yy_shed23;
    wind_dir_meteo=:E,
    bldg_face=:U,
    isUplift=false,
    x_to_ridge=23m,
    bw=8.0m,
    lw=46m,
    x_range=[0m, 46m])
display(res.plot)
println(res.calc_details)
```


#### Windward wall wind load

```{julia}
#| echo: false 
res_ww = fwindwardwall(wp_uls,
    bldg_yy_shed23;
    wind_dir=:E,
    isUplift=false,
    bw=8.0m,
    lw=12m,
    Ao_roof=A_open_roof,
    Ao_north=A_open_north,
    Ao_east=A_open_east,
    Ao_south=A_open_south,
    Ao_west=A_open_west)
_println(res_ww)
```

#### Leeward wall wind load

```{julia}
#| echo: false 
res_lw = fwindleewall(wp_uls,
    bldg_yy_shed23;
    wind_dir=:E,
    isUplift=false,
    bw=8.0m,
    lw=12m,
    Ao_roof=A_open_roof,
    Ao_north=A_open_north,
    Ao_east=A_open_east,
    Ao_south=A_open_south,
    Ao_west=A_open_west)
_println(res_lw)
```
